summary: Full stack testing of Aegis Imaging MVP. All 15 backend API tests pass. Frontend loads correctly with all UI components verified.

issues: Upload page content area appears blank initially in first screenshot - likely CSS background blending with frosted glass design, not functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: server.py and db.py are well-structured. db.py at 401 lines is near the 700-line threshold but acceptable
seed_demo_data() uses INSERT OR IGNORE which prevents duplicate seeding on restart - good pattern
ESCALATE count from seed data is 3 (not explicitly asserted in tests per spec '6 reject' matches correctly)
seed_data_creation: 20 demo records seeded at startup via db.py seed_demo_data(). 11 APPROVE, 6 REJECT, 3 ESCALATE.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Frontend renders Upload page (drag-drop + modality buttons), Dashboard (4 metric tiles, charts, 20-row audit table, 68.6% savings banner), and Audit Detail page (hash chain, agent cards). NavBar shows Aegis Imaging brand + Verify/Dashboard links. /api/v1/verify successfully processes image uploads with AI pipeline.
mocked_apis: 20 seed records are DEMO data. IronLabs API may be unreachable from env, auto-falls back to Emergent Universal Key.
